THE
NEXT
LEVEL.

Affordable · Personalized · Physician-Led

At Pure Renewal, every therapy is part of a personalized plan designed to restore balance, promote longevity, and optimize health from the inside out. Our concierge-style model ensures every patient receives individualized attention, continuous support, and access to the most advanced regenerative treatments in modern medicine.

View Membership PlansBook Consult →

Experience the next level of wellness in beautiful Downtown Orlando — where medicine meets renewal. Memberships starting as low as $199 per month with 0% patient financing available on all plans.

Weight Loss Membership

Peak Performance,
Muscle Definition
& Fat Reduction.

Our FIT/SLIM Protocol combines physician weight loss with microdosing peptide therapy that targets fat loss and protects muscle mass. Real results backed by science — complimentary consultations available.

Sculpted Weight Reduction
Targets fat loss while preserving lean muscle, helping reshape and tone the body with lasting results.
Optimized Metabolic Function
Enhances insulin sensitivity and glucose balance to restore metabolic efficiency and long-term vitality.
Renewed Energy & Performance
Ignites stamina, sharpens focus, and supports higher daily performance — empowering both body and mind.
Cardiovascular Renewal
Emerging research suggests benefits for blood pressure, cholesterol, and overall heart health.
Next-Generation Science
Retatrutide goes beyond weight management — delivering transformative results for energy, vitality, and whole-body balance.

Custom Peptide Membership

The Perfect
Trifecta.

What sets Pure Renewal apart is our integrative approach to cellular restoration, built upon the perfect trifecta of regenerative therapy — bio-identical hormones, peptides, and stem cells.

Bio-Identical Hormones
Precision hormone restoration using compounds molecularly identical to those your body naturally produces.
Peptide Therapy
Biological messengers signaling the body to perform specific regenerative functions at the cellular level.
Stem Cells
Cell-based regenerative medicine targeting tissue repair, inflammation reduction, and biological age reversal.
Custom Peptide Membership
14 SPECIALTY
PEPTIDE BLENDS

Physician-formulated combinations targeting every dimension of health. From longevity and immune support to athletic recovery and cognitive enhancement — every blend is precisely dosed and continuously monitored.

Patient Financing

on All Plans.

FAQ

Common
Questions.

Can't find your question? Call us directly at (407) 333-0496 or request a complimentary consultation — we'll answer everything.

What's included in my membership?
+
Every membership includes direct physician access, a personalized treatment plan, and access to the services outlined in your plan tier. The B. Well plan covers primary care, tele-health, GLP-1/2/3, vitamin therapy, ozone, red light, and specialty peptide blends. Weight Loss and Peptide Memberships include additional targeted protocols — all overseen by your dedicated physician.
Is there a contract or commitment?
+
Our memberships are designed around your goals, not our business model. We offer flexible month-to-month plans with 0% patient financing options. Ask our team about current commitment terms during your complimentary consultation.
How does the 0% financing work?
+
We offer 0% interest patient financing on all membership plans. This means you can access premium regenerative and concierge care starting at $199/month with no interest charges. Details are discussed during your consultation — no pressure, no hidden fees.
Can I upgrade my plan?
+
Absolutely. Many patients start with the B. Well Primary Care plan and upgrade to the Weight Loss Membership or Custom Peptide Membership as their health goals evolve. Your physician will guide you on the best plan for your current phase.
Is tele-health available on all plans?
+
Yes — tele-health visits via video or phone are included in all plans. We serve patients locally in Downtown Orlando and remotely from across the country. Our facility is also minutes from Orlando Executive Airport for private jet arrivals.
How do I get started?
+
Every new patient begins with a complimentary physician consultation — no commitment, no pressure. Fill out the form below, call us at (407) 333-0496, or email info@pure-renewal.com. Our team will reach out within 24 hours to schedule your visit.
